query: SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, awayGoalie, homeGoalie, awayGoalieGsax, homeGoalieGsax, awayGoalieShotsFaced, homeGoalieShotsFaced, awayGoalieGp, homeGoalieGp FROM games WHERE sport = 'NHL' LIMIT 10;
